title: Project Overview & Conventions
description: Start with the README and AGENTS.md to understand what RAIS Pro is — an enterprise manufacturing-intelligence OS that turns factory Excel reports into quality dashboards — and the hard rules governing the AI pipeline (the model classifies and narrates; it never does maths).

title: App Shell & Boot
description: How the Next.js App Router boots: the root layout and landing page mount the AppShell, which wires up the registry, events, and page-loading contexts shared across every screen.

title: Ingesting a Workbook
description: The first stage of the pipeline: UploadZone hands a spreadsheet to the workbook reader and header detector, which turn raw cells into a structured, profiled workbook.

title: Ontology & Column Understanding
description: How columns get meaning: the ontology mod-builder and the resolver ladder (exact index → LLM fallback) classify each column, backed by the knowledge store of learned mods.

title: The AI Provider Chain
description: Every AI call flows through tryModels in ai.ts, which walks Gateway → Anthropic → OpenRouter → Google → Groq → Ollama. Zod schemas in schemas.ts are the cross-provider contract for classification and narrative output.

title: Deterministic Analytics
description: All numbers come from pure JS: the analytics modules compute rejection rate, cost of poor quality, defect Pareto, and trust scoring over the raw rows — never from the model.

title: The Decision Engine
description: Reconciled data is run through a rule-based decision engine that emits explainable pass/reject/flag decisions over canonical variables.

title: Persistence Layer
description: How state survives: the store index and Supabase adapter persist sessions, mods, and append-only events; the SQL migrations define the underlying schema and RLS.

title: Rendering the Dashboard
description: The payoff: the editorial charts, Pareto chart, and insight/detail components render KPIs and SPC-style trends. The main dashboard page composes them into the executive view.

title: API Surface
description: Wrapping up: the route handlers that tie it together — ingest for staging manual entries and workbooks, mods for column-mapping, and events for the audit trail.
